title: dactylorhiza guimaraesii
intro: Dactylorhiza guimaraesii is a type of orchid commonly known as the Guimaraes' orchid or the Portuguese marsh orchid, a terrestrial orchid found in the Iberian Peninsula and northwestern Africa. The medicinal properties of Dactylorhiza guimaraesii include its ability to act as a diuretic, and it is also used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to help with conditions such as urinary incontinence, respiratory problems, and skin infections. Dactylorhiza guimaraesii is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
